title: About the Project — DIGI-METER
description: Learn about DIGI-METER — an Erasmus+ Forward-Looking project that translates DigComp 2.2 into practical, AI-supported digital competence assessment tools for schools and VET providers.

strings.source: An EU-funded research and development project translating the DigComp 2.2 framework into practical, evidence-based digital competence assessment tools for European schools and VET providers.
strings.value: An EU-funded research and development project translating the DigComp 2.2 framework into practical, evidence-based digital competence assessment tools for European schools and VET providers.

strings.source: While the DigComp 2.2 framework clearly defines the digital competences citizens need in today's world, its practical use in European schools and vocational education and training remains fragmented. Schools lack reliable tools to measure where learners actually stand. Teachers struggle to connect framework descriptors to everyday classroom realities. Policymakers cannot compare performance data across institutions and borders.
strings.value: While the DigComp 2.2 framework clearly defines the digital competences citizens need in today's world, its practical use in European schools and vocational education and training remains fragmented. Schools lack reliable tools to measure where learners actually stand. Teachers struggle to connect framework descriptors to everyday classroom realities. Policymakers cannot compare performance data across institutions and borders.

strings.source: DIGI-METER bridges this gap. By translating DigComp 2.2 into measurable indicators, AI-supported assessment tools, and clear dashboards, the project equips every stakeholder — learner, educator, institution, and policymaker — with actionable insight into digital competence development.
strings.value: DIGI-METER bridges this gap. By translating DigComp 2.2 into measurable indicators, AI-supported assessment tools, and clear dashboards, the project equips every stakeholder — learner, educator, institution, and policymaker — with actionable insight into digital competence development.

strings.source: DIGI-METER develops AI-supported self-assessment tools, educator dashboards, and policy-ready indicator frameworks — all built on a foundation of rigorous research, inclusive design, and responsible AI principles. Our approach is grounded in real classrooms, validated across countries, and designed to grow alongside learners.
strings.value: DIGI-METER develops AI-supported self-assessment tools, educator dashboards, and policy-ready indicator frameworks — all built on a foundation of rigorous research, inclusive design, and responsible AI principles. Our approach is grounded in real classrooms, validated across countries, and designed to grow alongside learners.

strings.source: Every DIGI-METER tool is built with transparency, fairness, GDPR compliance, and explainability as core design requirements — not afterthoughts. Learners always retain control over their data.
strings.value: Every DIGI-METER tool is built with transparency, fairness, GDPR compliance, and explainability as core design requirements — not afterthoughts. Learners always retain control over their data.

strings.source: What We Set Out to Achieve
strings.value: What We Set Out to Achieve

strings.source: Five core objectives guide the DIGI-METER project. Final wording will be aligned with the approved project application.
strings.value: Five core objectives guide the DIGI-METER project. Final wording will be aligned with the approved project application.

strings.source: Turn the DigComp 2.2 framework into measurable indicators and practical assessment tools for schools and vocational education and training.
strings.value: Turn the DigComp 2.2 framework into measurable indicators and practical assessment tools for schools and vocational education and training.

strings.source: Develop AI-supported self-assessment tools that give learners clear, personalised feedback on their digital competences.
strings.value: Develop AI-supported self-assessment tools that give learners clear, personalised feedback on their digital competences.

strings.source: Create a Teacher Dashboard & Open Resources
strings.value: Create a Teacher Dashboard & Open Resources

strings.source: Provide a teacher dashboard and open resources that help schools, VET providers, and policymakers understand, monitor, and improve digital skills.
strings.value: Provide a teacher dashboard and open resources that help schools, VET providers, and policymakers understand, monitor, and improve digital skills.

strings.source: Embed Ethics, Inclusion & Data Protection by Design
strings.value: Embed Ethics, Inclusion & Data Protection by Design

strings.source: Follow an ethics-by-design approach with attention to transparency, GDPR compliance, fairness, explainability, and user control, so that digital assessment is trustworthy, human-centred, and accessible to diverse learners.
strings.value: Follow an ethics-by-design approach with attention to transparency, GDPR compliance, fairness, explainability, and user control, so that digital assessment is trustworthy, human-centred, and accessible to diverse learners.

strings.source: Validate Across European Contexts & Inform Policy
strings.value: Validate Across European Contexts & Inform Policy

strings.source: Test and validate the tools across European contexts, supporting learners, teachers, education providers, and policy stakeholders in strengthening digital competence across Europe.
strings.value: Test and validate the tools across European contexts, supporting learners, teachers, education providers, and policy stakeholders in strengthening digital competence across Europe.

strings.source: DigComp 2.2 is the European Digital Competence Framework for Citizens, developed by the Joint Research Centre of the European Commission. It describes 21 digital competences across 5 areas and 8 proficiency levels — from Foundation (Level 1) to Highly Specialised (Level 8). DIGI-METER operationalises this framework into measurable, classroom-ready indicators.
strings.value: DigComp 2.2 is the European Digital Competence Framework for Citizens, developed by the Joint Research Centre of the European Commission. It describes 21 digital competences across 5 areas and 8 proficiency levels — from Foundation (Level 1) to Highly Specialised (Level 8). DIGI-METER operationalises this framework into measurable, classroom-ready indicators.

strings.source: Personalised self-assessment results and feedback helping them understand where they are and what to focus on next in their digital competence journey.
strings.value: Personalised self-assessment results and feedback helping them understand where they are and what to focus on next in their digital competence journey.

strings.source: Class-level dashboards showing aggregate competence data, supporting lesson planning, CPD decisions, and early identification of students needing targeted support.
strings.value: Class-level dashboards showing aggregate competence data, supporting lesson planning, CPD decisions, and early identification of students needing targeted support.

strings.source: School and VET-centre level reporting enabling institutional leaders to benchmark digital competence levels, demonstrate progress, and plan strategic interventions.
strings.value: School and VET-centre level reporting enabling institutional leaders to benchmark digital competence levels, demonstrate progress, and plan strategic interventions.

strings.source: System-level, cross-country aggregated data and evidence-based policy briefs to inform national digital education strategies and EU-level digital competence policy.
strings.value: System-level, cross-country aggregated data and evidence-based policy briefs to inform national digital education strategies and EU-level digital competence policy.
